tasks.iwara: SECRET_KEY_FILE=secret_key.txt DB_PASSWORD_FILE=db_password.txt IWARA_CONF_FILE=iwara.json deno run --allow-all --watch index.ts
tasks.full: SECRET_KEY_FILE=secret_key.txt DB_PASSWORD_FILE=db_password.txt COOKIES_FILE=cookie_secret.txt PROXY_STRING_FILE=proxy_string.txt IWARA_CONF_FILE=iwara.json deno run --allow-all --watch index.ts
